title: My Monster Girls
body:
# Early access
My Monster Girls is a resource pack that replaces the standard models of some mobs with female versions. Now monsters have acquired a more sophisticated and elegant look, while maintaining their original atmosphere in the Minecraft world.
- Adds unique female mob models, enlivening the look of the game.
- Retains the vanilla Minecraft style, but makes the mobs more diverse.
- The resource pack only modifies models, textures and sounds, without affecting the mechanics of the game.
### Mobs preview 
![Mobs preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/42700fdcfe115db04fad8112d493c9a32a54a21a.png)

I advise you to use [THIS](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/minimal-armor-countxd) resource pack because the original armor doesn't look good on mobs.

I was inspired:
- [redstonae](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fem-zombies+)
  
Sounds from:
- [Cute Mob Sounds](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/voice-for-cute-mob-models-female-mob-voices/)
